revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24744680692|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:氷鉋斗賣神社]] {{Expand Japanese|氷鉋斗賣神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Higanotome Shrine | native_name = 氷鉋斗賣神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Higanotome Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|36.609111|138.161382}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Utsushi Hikanasaku no Mikoto|lt=Utsushi Hikanasaku no Mikoto|fr|Utsushihikanasaku|ja|宇都志日金拆命|qid=Q86736058|1=Utsushi Hikanasaku no Mikoto}} }} {{nihongo|'''Higanotome Shrine'''|氷鉋斗賣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shinano Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q135419779|ltq=Q135419779|qid=Q135419779|1=Shikinai Supershrine}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Shinano Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Shinano Province|ja|信濃国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11386164|1=List of Shikinaisha in Shinano Province}} ** Series ordinal: 16 ** P155: {{ill|Shimitsuno Shrine|lt=Shimitsuno Shrine|qid=Q135039921|1=Shimitsuno Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135039924|ltq=Q135039924|qid=Q135039924|1=Ikeno Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Nagano (city)|lt=Nagano|af|Nagano|an|Nagano|ar|ناغانو (ناغانو)|arz|ناجانو|ast|Nagano|azb|ناقانو (شهر)|az|Naqano|ban|Nagano, Nagano|ba|Нагано|be|Нагана|bg|Нагано (град)|bn|নাগানো|br|Nagano|ca|Nagano|ceb|Nagano Shi|ce|Нагано|cs|Nagano|da|Nagano|de|Nagano|devoyage|Nagano|el|Ναγκάνο|en|Nagano (city)|envoyage|Nagano|eo|Nagano|eovoyage|Nagano (urbo)|es|Nagano|et|Nagano|eu|Nagano|fa|ناگانو (شهر)|fi|Nagano|fivoyage|Nagano|fo|Nagano|fr|Nagano|frvoyage|Nagano|fy|Nagano (stêd)|ga|Nagano|gl|Nagano|he|נאגנו|hr|Nagano|hu|Nagano|hy|Նագանո|id|Nagano|idvoyage|Nagano|ie|Nagano|io|Nagano|it|Nagano|ja|長野市|javoyage|長野市|ka|ნაგანო Nagano|tr|Nagano|tt|Нагано|uk|Нагано|ur|ناگانو، ناگانو|uz|Nagano|vi|Nagano (thành phố)|war|Nagano (syudad)|wuu|长野市|zh_classical|長野市|zh_min_nan|Nagano-chhī|zh_yue|長野市|zh|長野市|qid=Q128849|1=Nagano (city)}} * {{ill|Shinano Province|lt=Shinano Province|ckb|پارێزگای شینانۆ|cs|Provincie Šinano|de|Provinz Shinano|en|Shinano Province|eo|Provinco Ŝinano|es|Provincia de Shinano|fa|ولایت Shinano|pt|Província de Shinano|ru|Синано (провинция)|simple|Shinano Province|sk|Šinano (provincia)|sr|Провинција Шинано|th|แคว้นชินาโนะ|tr|Shinano (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Сінано|zh_min_nan|Sinano-kok|zh_yue|信濃國|zh|信濃國|qid=Q289250|1=Shinano Province}} * {{ill|Q7423207|ltq=Q7423207|qid=Q7423207|1=Sarashina District, Nagano}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|36.609111|138.161382}} == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Utsushi Hikanasaku no Mikoto|lt=Utsushi Hikanasaku no Mikoto|fr|Utsushihikanasaku|ja|宇都志日金拆命|qid=Q86736058|1=Utsushi Hikanasaku no Mikoto}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181984 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Gō-sha|lt=Gō-sha|ja|郷社|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * ひがのとめじんじゃ == has part(s) (P527) == * {{ill|Higanotome Shrine|lt=Higanotome Shrine|qid=Q135194194|1=Higanotome Shrine}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database ** P1352: {'amount': '+1', 'unit': '1'} ** P3831: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Higanotome Shrine|lt=Higanotome Shrine|qid=Q135194198|1=Higanotome Shrine}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database ** P1352: {'amount': '+2', 'unit': '1'} ** P3831: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '長野県長野市川中島町上氷鉋755', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:氷鉋斗賣神社]] {{wikidata link|Q85881759}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Higanotome Shrine |画像 ={{画像募集中|cat=長野市}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nagano Prefecture|Q127877|qid=Q127877|1=Nagano Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nagano|Q128849|qid=Q128849|1=Nagano (city)}} Kawanakajima-chō Kamihigano 755 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Utsushihikanesaku-no-Mikoto|Q86736058|qid=Q86736058|1=Utsushi Hikanasaku no Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nagano|label=Higanotome
Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Higanotome Shrine''' (ひがのとめじんじゃ) is a shrine in {{ill|lt=Nagano|Q128849|qid=Q128849|1=Nagano (city)}}, {{ill|lt=Nagano Prefecture|Q127877|qid=Q127877|1=Nagano Prefecture}}. Its {{ill|lt=former shrine rank under the modern system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|lt=former rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} was gōsha. === Overview === It is one of the eleven shrines of {{ill|lt=Sarashina District|Q7423207|qid=Q7423207|1=Sarashina District, Nagano}} in {{ill|lt=Shinano Province|Q289250|qid=Q289250|1=Shinano Province}} listed in the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}''. In the {{ill|lt=Wamyō Ruijushō|Q2702542|qid=Q2702542|1=Wamyō Ruijushō}}, Higano-go and Tome-go are separate, but it is thought to have been the ujigami shrine of a village where both had merged in the Heian period. There is also a theory that the place name "Higano" derives from the enshrined deity {{ill|lt=Utsushihikanesaku-no-Mikoto|Q86736058|qid=Q86736058|1=Utsushi Hikanasaku no Mikoto}}Iwao Yamato, ''A Study of Ancient Shinano History'' (Yamato Shobō, 2013). It is also recorded in the "Suwa Shrine Shimosha Shunjū no Miya Zōgū no Shidai" of {{ill|lt=1488|Q8079|qid=Q8079|1=Wii}} (Chōkyō 2) and in a grant document to {{ill|lt=Takeda Shingen|Q276404|qid=Q276404|1=Takeda Shingen}} in {{ill|lt=1567|Q6698|qid=Q6698|1=Gohrisch}} (Eiroku 10). The principal deity is {{ill|lt=Utsushihikanesaku-no-Mikoto|Q86736058|qid=Q86736058|1=Utsushi Hikanasaku no Mikoto}}, ancestral deity of the Azumi no Muraji, and {{ill|qid=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|UNKNOWN|qid=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata-no-Kami|1=Takeminakata}} with {{ill|lt=Yasakatome-no-Kami|Q9150392|qid=Q9150392|1=Yasakatome}} are enshrined together in the same hall. There is Kawanakajima Tome Shrine in Kamihigano and Higano Shrine in Nakahigano; these are presumed to be branch enshrinements made when the former single village was divided. === References === * ''Shinshū Culture Series: Temples and Shrines'' (1981), {{ill|lt=Shinano Mainichi Shimbun|Q11386181|qid=Q11386181|lt=Shinano Mainichi Shimbun Co.|1=Shinano Mainichi Shimbun}} * Edited by {{ill|lt=Kenichi Tanigawa|Q2392596|qid=Q2392596|1=Ken'ichi Tanigawa}}, ''Gods of Japan - Shrines and Sacred Places - 9 Mino, Hida, Shinano'' (2000), {{ill|lt=Hakusuisha|Q4346470|qid=Q4346470|1=Hakusuisha Publishing}} === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=長野県}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Higanotome Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Higanotome Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Higanotome Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Shinano Province]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Shinano Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nagano]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Nagano Prefecture]]
